pr.title: feat: fix chord back-navigation + add ScaleDetailScreen (Scales expansion)
pr.body:
All chord detail transitions used `context.go` (stack-replacing), breaking the back button. Related scales chips navigated to `/scales` with no context. Scales had no detail view — `relatedChords` data was loaded but never surfaced in the UI.

## Navigation fixes
- `ChordLibraryScreen._ChordCard`, `ChordDetailScreen` related voicings and style-match chips: `context.go` → `context.push` to preserve back-stack
- Related scales chips: `context.go('/scales')` → `context.push('/scales/${Uri.encodeComponent(scale)}')` — deep-links to the specific scale

## Scales expansion
- **New `ScaleDetailScreen`** at `/scales/:id` (URL-encoded scale name): name + type header, play button, notes chips, interval chips, description, common usage, related chords chips
- `/scales` route in `navigation.dart` gains a `/scales/:id` sub-route
- `ScalesViewModel` gains a `_nameIndex` Map (built at load) + `findByName()` for O(1) lookup — same pattern as `ChordViewModel._nameIndex`
- `_ScaleCard` converted to `StatelessWidget`; inline expand removed in favour of navigate-on-tap; `_PlayScaleButton` moved to the detail screen
- `AppStrings`: added `scaleNotes`, `scaleDescription`, `scaleIntervals`
pr.author: Copilot
